title: ☀️ Power Book ☢️ - Compact, Tileable, No Waste Nuclear, Solar, Steam
bodyMarkdown:
By **Yoyo Ma** — [View on FactorioPrints](https://factorioprints.com/view/-Kn2afLokZdBO-uHcIAF).

Compact, tileable, no-waste nuclear, solar and steam power designs, updated for Factorio 2.0 with better UPS.

*Blueprint book with 11 blueprints; made for Factorio 2.0.*
